portwatch_chokepoints.note: Daily AIS-derived tanker counts. Anomaly = 7-day mean below threshold vs pre-crisis baseline OR 30d avg (ports avg>=5). T6-S45: 7d mean (was single-day, smooths ~5d feed lag) + strategic ports alert at -40% (0.60), others -50% (0.50).

items.title: Indian Refiners Freeze Domestic Jet Fuel Prices

items.title: Oil Prices Rise as Israel Expands Lebanon Offensive and U.S. Strikes Iran

items.title: The Iran War’s First 90 Days Upended Energy Markets

items.title: Spent Nuclear Fuel Could Be America's Answer to Russia's Uranium Grip

items.title: China’s Oil Buying Pause Won’t Last Forever

items.title: America’s LNG Boom Is Real — But China Is Planning Beyond It

items.title: Cuba Bets on Solar Power as Energy Crisis Deepens
items.summary: Cuba has been experiencing a worsening energy crisis for several years, which previously led it to rely heavily on Venezuela for its fuel. Following the United States’ intervention in Venezuela in February, the energy crisis has grown even worse,...

items.title: Morocco Is Emerging as a Renewable Energy Superpower

recent_events.title: Follow-up message by the WHO Director-General to the people of Tenerife regarding the hantavirus response
recent_events.summary: A message from the Director-General of the World Health Organization expressing gratitude to the people of Tenerife for their solidarity and successful cooperation during the operation to safely disembark and care for over 120 passengers from 23 countries amid an outbreak of hantavirus.

recent_events.title: Message by the WHO Director-General to the people of Tenerife regarding the hantavirus response
recent_events.summary: To the people of Tenerife,  My name is Tedros, and I serve as the Director-General of the World Health Organization, the United Nations agency responsible for global public health. It is not common for me to write directly to the people of a single community, but today I feel it is not only appropriate, it is necessary.  I want to speak to you directly, not through press releases or technical briefings, but as one human being to another, because you deserve that.  I know you are worried. I know

recent_events.title: WHO’s response to hantavirus cases linked to a cruise ship
recent_events.summary: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, briefed media today on a cluster of hantavirus cases linked to a cruise ship, the MV Hondius.  Eight cases have been reported so far, including three deaths. Five of the 8 cases have been confirmed as hantavirus.  The hantavirus involved is the  Andes  virus, the only species known to be capable of limited transmission between humans, linked to close and prolonged contact. defesa.label: Defesa
defesa.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: incendios e o gap mais critico (PT/Norte alto risco).

themes.note: Decomposicao em 8 temas da enciclopedia (T6-S26). Score=None quando dados insuficientes. Anti-synthetic: nao fabrica scores. Cada tema lista gaps_to_close_priority com APIs livres a integrar em S27+.
